Summary

Wires the Phase Architecture v2 Review Gate handoff helper into lib/evaluation/processor.ts.

The processor no longer opens Review Gate from Story Layer readiness alone. It now uses buildReviewGateHandoff(...) so Review Gate opens only when:

pass1a_story_layer_v1 exists
ledger_quality_report_v1 exists
Pass 3A is terminal-and-gate-valid

Ready path

Preserves existing valid handoff semantics:

status=queued
phase=review_gate
phase_status=awaiting_approval
review_gate_entered_at
Story Layer and quality report artifact references

Also persists Phase v2 readiness fields:

review_gate_ready: true
pass3a_gate_validity
pass3a_status
pass3a_artifact_id
pass3a_degraded_reason where applicable

Blocked path

When Review Gate is not ready:

does not transition to review_gate
does not set phase_status='awaiting_approval'
logs block_code and block_reason
persists safe blocked progress
releases lease and re-queues to phase_1a

Tests

Adds/updates coverage for:

done Pass 3A with valid preflight artifact
degraded Pass 3A with structured proof
missing Pass 3A
running/map_done/reduce_running Pass 3A
failed Pass 3A
done without pass3_preflight_draft_v1
degraded without structured proof
processor invariant proving it imports and calls buildReviewGateHandoff(...)

Scope guard

Does not change:

scoring
Phase 2 criteria logic
synthesis
WAVE execution
Quality Gate
Pass 3A runtime extraction
manuscript chunking
provider calls

Known unrelated test failure

Known unrelated pre-existing failure: __tests__/lib/evaluation/processor.real-gate.test.ts fails on clean main with the same Phase 3 real-gate assertions.

Evidence:
- Current branch run: 1 failed suite, 4 failed / 1 passed tests.
- Clean main run (after stashing local changes, checkout main, npm install): same suite failure and same failing assertions including:
  - E2E LOCK: fully-scorable under-anchor criterion hard-fails and blocks persistence
  - V2 SCORE-CONFIDENCE DOWNGRADE: mismatch downgrades criterion and persists canonical V2 output

This PR does not modify Phase 3 scoring, synthesis, WAVE, or provider behavior.
